value: DISCOVER YOUR PLACE IN THE ECOSYSTEM
Welcome to Ergo! New to our vast ecosystem and not sure where to begin? This short quiz will help you identify which aspects of Ergo might interest you most and guide you to personalized resources.
Answer a few simple questions to find your path: Are you a future Investor, Developer, Miner, NFT Enthusiast, DeFi User, or something else?
What primarily attracts you to blockchain technology and Ergo?
Building applications and contributing to new technologies
Supporting network security and earning rewards through hardware
Collecting, creating, or trading unique digital items and art
Using new financial tools for borrowing, lending, or trading
Enhancing my financial privacy and anonymity
I'm new and just want to learn the basics first!
How would you describe your technical comfort level?
Very comfortable; I can code or manage complex systems
Moderately comfortable; I can learn new software and follow guides
Not very technical; I prefer simple and user-friendly applications
What kind of activity within Ergo are you most interested in?
Growing my assets and exploring financial instruments
Creating new tools, dApps, or smart contracts
Securing the network and earning ERG
Deeply understanding the technology and its principles
If you're interested in finance/investment, what's your approach to new financial technologies?
Looking for established, lower-risk ways to engage
Exploring DeFi opportunities while understanding the risks
Interested in cutting-edge, experimental financial tools
Not particularly interested in financial aspects
If you want to contribute, what type of participation inspires you most?
Creating educational content, art, or marketing materials
Helping others in the community and answering questions
Participating in governance discussions and proposals

You're drawn to creating innovative applications and contributing to cutting-edge technology! Ergo's powerful ErgoScript and eUTXO model offer unique opportunities to build secure and efficient dApps.

You're ready to explore innovative financial instruments and opportunities that Ergo's decentralized world offers! Discover new ways to manage assets, earn returns, and participate in the future of finance.
You're interested in Ergo's long-term potential and want to understand the fundamentals before making investment decisions. Focus on learning about the technology and ecosystem growth.
You're interested in supporting Ergo's network security while earning rewards! Ergo uses the Autolykos v2 algorithm, which is ASIC-resistant and designed for fair mining.
You're excited about unique digital items, art, and collectibles! Ergo's NFT ecosystem offers innovative marketplaces and creation tools with low fees and high security.
You value financial privacy and want to protect your transaction history! Ergo offers cutting-edge privacy tools built on Sigma protocols for trustless and secure privacy enhancement.
You're new to Ergo and want to understand the fundamentals first! Perfect - learning the basics will help you make informed decisions about how to engage with the ecosystem.
Join others who share your interests and get support on your Ergo journey

How Ergo compares to other blockchains
No known protocol-level reentrancy class; predictable execution costs
Reentrancy patterns and gas price auctions common in account models
Sigma protocols for threshold/multisig and privacy; ring-like constructions possible
Often requires external add-ons or trusted services
Mutable global state; complex reentrancy-safe patterns
Be part of the growing Ergo ecosystem
Smart Contracts, Frontend Apps, Tools & Libraries
